creator: Your Name
niche: one line: the subject you want to be known for (e.g. 'restaurant marketing', 'indie game dev', 'personal finance for freelancers')
voice: how your scripts should sound (e.g. premise-first, blunt, contrarian-but-grounded, no em dashes)

primary_lane.label: Industry
primary_lane.definition: your core niche: teach real, concrete value in your subject (educational / insight led)

secondary_lane.label: Viral videos
secondary_lane.definition: reach plays adjacent to your niche: borrow a proven viral mechanic to go viral. Lighter, less educational, optional.

brand.name: Your Name (appears on carousel slides; defaults to 'creator' above)
